My partner and I are planning a 5-day trip from Munich to Vienna from July 10th to 14th, 2026. We have a total budget of €1,200. We enjoy visiting museums, trying local food, and exploring the city on foot. Please suggest accommodations and a daily itinerary.

Deterministic review summary: Missing likely task types: flight. | Potentially uncovered constraints: Trip start date must be in the future.; Trip end date must be after the trip start date.. | The task list is comprehensive and covers all user requirements including budget management, specific interests (museums, walking, food), and logistics. All tasks are grounded in the provided constraints and follow the required type definitions.

}

constraint_list.text: interests: Museums, local food, exploring the city on foot

Trip end date must be after the trip start date.
Trip duration must be at least 1 day.
Budget must be a positive value.
Car or road trip transport is not feasible for island or overseas destinations — a flight or ferry is required.

normalized_constraints.interests: Museums, local food, exploring the city on foot

task_list.name: transportation_munich_vienna
task_list.text: Find train or flight options from Munich to Vienna for July 10th and returning July 14th, 2026 for 2 people within a budget-conscious range.

task_list.name: vienna_accommodation
task_list.text: Search for accommodations in Vienna for 4 nights (July 10-14) for 2 adults with a total budget under €600 to allow for other expenses.

task_list.name: vienna_museums
task_list.text: Identify top-rated museums in Vienna, such as the Kunsthistorisches Museum or Belvedere, suitable for a 5-day itinerary.

task_list.name: vienna_walking_tours
task_list.text: Find self-guided walking routes or pedestrian-friendly areas in Vienna's Innere Stadt and surrounding districts.

task_list.name: vienna_local_food
task_list.text: Find traditional Viennese restaurants and cafes offering local specialties like Schnitzel and Sachertorte within a moderate budget.

task_list.name: museum_opening_hours
task_list.text: Check the opening hours for major Vienna museums for the dates July 10-14, 2026.

task_list.name: itinerary_routing_check
task_list.text: Verify the walking distances between selected museums, restaurants, and the chosen accommodation to ensure a walkable itinerary.

slots.name: Outbound train: Munich Hbf → Wien Hbf
slots.description: Budget-conscious rail transfer from Munich to Vienna. Target a direct ÖBB Railjet/DB service when July 2026 tickets open; current official-style guidance indicates about 4 hours, with advance fares from about €19.99 per person each way. Exact train number/timetable should be booked once released.
slots.notes: Cost estimate for 2 people one-way using advance Sparschiene/Super Sparpreis-style fares plus small reservation buffer; exact fare not guaranteed.

slots.name: Transfer to Hotel Pension Walzerstadt
slots.description: Take U-Bahn/tram from Wien Hauptbahnhof toward Neubau/Zieglergasse and drop bags at the hotel. Routing tool was unavailable, so timing is a conservative estimate.
slots.location: Wien Hbf → Hotel Pension Walzerstadt, 1070 Vienna
slots.notes: Covered by planned Vienna public-transport pass; route timing not API-verified due missing routing key.

slots.name: Check-in: Hotel Pension Walzerstadt
slots.description: Suggested accommodation: Hotel Pension Walzerstadt, a budget-friendly 1070/Neubau option with WiFi and strong hotel-search rating. Quoted search result: €96/night for 4 nights.
slots.notes: Total lodging estimate for 2 adults, 4 nights. Alternative: Hotel Schani Salon at about €106/night if availability changes.

slots.name: Lunch: Vollpension Johannesgasse
slots.description: Late lunch/cake at Vollpension, a local Viennese café/social business where seniors bake traditional cakes. Johannesgasse branch is central and open daily 08:00–18:00.
slots.notes: Estimated €35 for 2 for light lunch/cake and coffee.

slots.name: Self-guided Innere Stadt courtyard walk
slots.description: Explore the old city on foot: Stephansplatz, quiet lanes, hidden Durchhäuser/courtyards, Blutgasse area, and elegant Ringstraße edges. Keep it flexible after the train journey.
slots.notes: Low-cost walking-focused arrival activity; stay respectful in semi-private courtyards.

slots.name: Dinner: Gasthaus Pöschl
slots.description: Traditional central Viennese Beisl dinner. Gasthaus Pöschl is near Stephansplatz and typically open Monday–Saturday 12:00–23:00; good for classic Austrian dishes.
slots.notes: Estimated €60 for 2 with mains and drinks; reserve ahead.

slots.name: Buy/activate 7-day Vienna public transport ticket
slots.description: Activate the digital 7-day Vienna public transport ticket instead of the 72-hour/Vienna City Card option. Validator repair: this cheaper ticket covers all city trams/U-Bahn/buses through the Day 5 departure transfer and reduces total cost versus €29 per person 72-hour coverage.
slots.notes: Estimated €25.20 per person x 2 = €50.40; buy digitally after checking 2026 fare terms.

slots.name: Breakfast: local bakery/café near Neubau
slots.description: Simple Viennese bakery breakfast before the museum day: coffee, pastries, or rolls near the hotel.
slots.notes: No specific booking needed; estimated €20 for 2.

slots.name: Walk/transit to Kunsthistorisches Museum
slots.description: Travel from Neubau to Maria-Theresien-Platz. This is a central, walkable segment or short tram/U-Bahn ride; exact routing could not be API-verified.
slots.location: Hotel Pension Walzerstadt → Kunsthistorisches Museum Wien
slots.notes: Covered by transport pass; approximate timing.

slots.name: Kunsthistorisches Museum Wien
slots.description: Visit Vienna’s major art-history museum: Bruegel, Kunstkammer treasures, imperial collections, and the grand Semper building. July schedule found: daily 10:00–18:00; adult admission about €22 online.
slots.notes: Book tickets/timed options ahead in high season.

slots.name: Lunch: Glacis Beisl at MuseumsQuartier
slots.description: Classic Viennese lunch in the leafy MuseumsQuartier garden. Official MQ hours found: daily 12:00–24:00.
slots.notes: Estimated €50 for 2; reserve garden seating if weather is good.

slots.name: MuseumsQuartier courtyards and Neubau walk
slots.description: Stroll the MQ courtyards, then wander Spittelberg/Neubau streets for galleries, small shops, and people-watching. The MQ grounds are free and open around the clock; museum entries optional.
slots.notes: Keeps the day walkable after the KHM visit.

slots.name: Dinner: Figlmüller Wollzeile
slots.description: Classic schnitzel dinner at Figlmüller’s original Wollzeile location. Official hours found: daily 11:00–22:30, kitchen until 21:30.
slots.notes: Reserve several weeks ahead; budget includes schnitzel, sides, and drinks for 2.

slots.name: Sunday breakfast: Café Museum near Karlsplatz
slots.description: Sunday-safe breakfast option before the Karlsplatz walk. Café Museum is a historic Viennese café near Karlsplatz/Opera; web verification found it open Sundays from about 08:00, while Naschmarkt produce stalls are closed on Sundays.
slots.notes: Use this instead of Naschmarkt stalls on Sunday; Naschmarkt gastronomy may operate Sunday 10:00–21:00, but produce/market stalls are closed.

slots.name: Karlsplatz and Stadtpark architecture walk
slots.description: Free self-guided walk around Karlsplatz, Otto Wagner pavilion exteriors, Secession area, and Stadtpark edges before lunch. This keeps Sunday lower-cost while still museum/architecture themed.
slots.notes: Wien Museum remains a paid optional add-on if budget allows; this slot uses exterior/public spaces.

slots.name: Lunch: Vollpension Schleifmühlgasse
slots.description: Lunch/cake stop at the original Vollpension near Naschmarkt. Sunday availability checked: official-style web result confirms Schleifmühlgasse is open daily including Sundays, 08:00–20:00; reserve ahead for a July Sunday.
slots.notes: Sunday closing-law check completed: this café is open Sunday; Johannesgasse branch is a backup with daily 08:00–18:00 hours.

slots.name: Walk/tram to Belvedere
slots.description: Move from Karlsplatz/Naschmarkt area toward the Upper Belvedere, by walking plus tram or a short public-transport hop.
slots.notes: Covered by transport pass; timing approximate.

slots.name: Upper Belvedere and gardens
slots.description: See Klimt’s The Kiss and the Upper Belvedere collection, then walk the free Baroque gardens. Sunday availability checked for July 12: Upper Belvedere is open daily/Sunday 09:00–18:00; reserve timed entry, noting possible renovation impacts in 2026.
slots.notes: Sunday check completed: 14:00–17:30 fits within 09:00–18:00 opening; last admission may be 30–60 minutes before closing.

slots.name: Dinner: Café Sacher light meal and Original Sacher-Torte
slots.description: Traditional Viennese café evening near the Opera with cake and coffee/light meal. Sunday availability checked: Café Sacher is expected to be open daily on Sunday July 12, with current verified hours around 08:00–23:00; Sacher Eck/shop are backups if queues are long. Café Central is excluded because it is expected to be closed for renovation in July 2026.
slots.notes: Sunday check completed: dinner slot fits within daily hours; expect queues and consider Sacher Eck if main café is full.

slots.name: Breakfast: local bakery/café near Neubau
slots.description: Simple breakfast near the hotel before heading to Leopoldstadt/Prater.
slots.notes: Estimated €20 for 2.

slots.name: Transit to Praterstern / Prater
slots.description: Use U-Bahn/tram to reach Praterstern, then walk into the Prater. Routing tool unavailable; timing is conservative.
slots.notes: Covered by public-transport pass.

slots.name: Prater Hauptallee walk
slots.description: Free walk along the Prater Hauptallee and quieter green edges before lunch, focusing on local leisure culture and city walking.
slots.notes: Optional bowling at Kugeltanz can be added only if there is spare budget.

slots.name: Lunch: Schweizerhaus Prater
slots.description: Classic Prater beer garden lunch. Official-season info found: open daily in July, 11:00–23:00, kitchen until 22:30; known for Stelze and beer garden atmosphere.
slots.notes: Estimated €65 for 2; order one shared Stelze if portions are large.

slots.name: Leopoldstadt canal and Augarten walk
slots.description: Walk north/west through Leopoldstadt toward the Danube Canal or Augarten for a quieter neighborhood afternoon. Free, pedestrian-friendly exploration.
slots.notes: Flexible walking block; shorten if hot.

slots.name: Dinner: Bauernbräu
slots.description: Traditional Austrian dinner at the moderate-budget Bauernbräu. Restaurant search returned high rating and Monday hours 17:00–23:00.
slots.notes: Good fit near Gumpendorf/Neubau for final full evening.

slots.name: Breakfast and check-out
slots.description: Simple breakfast, pack, and check out of Hotel Pension Walzerstadt.
slots.notes: Estimated breakfast for 2.

slots.name: Naschmarkt morning food walk
slots.description: Final local-food stroll through Naschmarkt. Official market hours found: Monday–Friday 06:00–21:00; food items vary by vendor.
slots.notes: Budget for snacks/souvenirs; Tuesday market should be open.

slots.name: Lunch: Naschmarkt casual stalls
slots.description: Casual final lunch from Naschmarkt stalls or market restaurants before collecting luggage.
slots.notes: Estimated €35 for 2.

slots.name: Transfer to Wien Hauptbahnhof
slots.description: Collect bags and transfer to Wien Hauptbahnhof for the return train. Timing is conservative and not API-verified.
slots.location: Hotel Pension Walzerstadt / Naschmarkt → Wien Hauptbahnhof
slots.notes: Covered by transport pass if still valid; otherwise budget a single ticket.

slots.name: Return train: Wien Hbf → Munich Hbf
slots.description: Return to Munich by direct rail if available. Official-style rail research indicates about 4 hours and budget advance fares from around €19.99 per person; exact July 2026 timetable/fare must be booked once released.
slots.notes: Cost estimate for 2 people one-way with reservation buffer; exact price not guaranteed.

todos.title: Switch Day 1 public transport pass from 72-hour/Vienna City Card to cheaper 7-day Vienna ticket covering Day 5 departure
Verify Sunday July 12 restaurant and activity availability and update Day 3 notes if needed
Check revised cost summary remains within €1,200 budget
